geographic_restrictions: Massachusetts (MA) and Rhode Island (RI), with a focus on the SouthCoast region (Fall River, New Bedford, Pawtucket, Providence, Central Falls, Somerset, Boston, Bristol, Newport, Falmouth)
project_area: Offshore wind education, workforce development, economic development, and environmental justice initiatives
demographic_requirements: Priority given to environmental justice communities and historically marginalized groups, including low-income individuals, communities of color, and underserved populations.
eligibility_summary: Non-profit organizations in Massachusetts and Rhode Island, particularly those serving environmental justice communities, are eligible to apply. Focus areas include offshore wind education, workforce training, economic development, and community outreach programs that empower marginalized groups to participate in the offshore wind industry.
